svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Pede Aqui Order Flow" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-624" dy="-623" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="2460" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1A252F;" value="Pede Aqui — End-to-End Order Flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="38" width="900" x="50" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EBF5FB;strokeColor=#2E86C1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1A5276;arcSize=20;" value="PHASE 1 — Order Placement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="260" x="60" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEF9E7;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#784212;arcSize=20;" value="PHASE 2 — Fulfillment & Delivery" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="280" x="520" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;dashPattern=8 4;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#AAAAAA;" value=""> <mxGeometry height="10" width="10" x="430" y="56" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="430" y="2410" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="430" y="56" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="430" y="2410" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8F9FA;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;arcSize=5;verticalAlign=top;" value="LEGEND" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="280" x="870" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D6EAF8;strokeColor=#2E86C1;fontSize=10;" value="Customer Action" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="160" x="888" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDEBD0;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;" value="API / System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="160" x="888" y="132" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5F5E3;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontSize=10;" value="Vendor Action" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="160" x="888" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8DAEF;strokeColor=#7D3C98;fontSize=10;" value="Courier Action" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="160" x="888" y="208" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEF9E7;strokeColor=#F39C12;fontSize=10;" value="Decision" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="80" x="888" y="246" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FADBD8;strokeColor=#C0392B;fontSize=10;" value="Error / Failure State" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="160" x="888" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1E8449;strokeColor=#145A32;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="START" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="120" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D6EAF8;strokeColor=#2E86C1;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Customer / Courier Login</b><br><font color="#555">Keycloak OAuth2 / PKCE<br>Returns JWT access token</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="60" y="194" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D6EAF8;strokeColor=#2E86C1;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Browse Catalog</b><br><font color="#555">GET /catalog/vendors — Redis cache (60s TTL)<br>Products, categories, availability</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="60" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D6EAF8;strokeColor=#2E86C1;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Add Items to Cart</b><br><font color="#555">POST /cart/items — persisted in PostgreSQL<br>Validates stock via inventory module</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="60" y="406" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDEBD0;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Checkout</b><br><font color="#555">POST /checkout — idempotency key required<br>Validates cart, calculates total + fees</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="60" y="512" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDEBD0;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Payment Confirmed</b><br><font color="#555">Mock payment gateway — confirms synchronously<br>All steps in one DB transaction</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="60" y="618" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDEBD0;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Order Created in DB</b><br><font color="#555">Status: PAYMENT_CONFIRMED<br>Delivery record created; audit log written</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="60" y="724" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDEBD0;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Vendor Notified</b><br><font color="#555">Notification module persists alert<br>Vendor sees order in Backoffice dashboard</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="60" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEF9E7;strokeColor=#F39C12;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Vendor
Accepts?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="535" y="826" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5F5E3;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>ACCEPTED_BY_VENDOR</b><br><font color="#555">Vendor confirms order in Backoffice</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="946" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5F5E3;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>PREPARING</b><br><font color="#555">Vendor marks order as being prepared</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="1042" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="24" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5F5E3;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>READY_FOR_PICKUP</b><br><font color="#555">Vendor marks order ready at counter</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="1138" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="25" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDEBD0;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Dispatch: Find Courier</b><br><font color="#555">First APPROVED + online courier in operatingZoneId<br>Excludes prior reassigned courier</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="520" y="1234" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="26" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEF9E7;strokeColor=#F39C12;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Courier
Available?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="535" y="1340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="27" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDEBD0;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Courier Assigned &amp; Notified</b><br><font color="#555">Delivery record linked to courier<br>Push notification sent to Courier App</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="1460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="28" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8DAEF;strokeColor=#7D3C98;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Courier ACCEPTED</b><br><font color="#555">Courier accepts delivery in App</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="1556" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="29" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8DAEF;strokeColor=#7D3C98;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>ARRIVED_AT_VENDOR</b><br><font color="#555">Courier marks arrival at pickup point</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="1652" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8DAEF;strokeColor=#7D3C98;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>PICKED_UP</b><br><font color="#555">Courier confirms pickup from vendor</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="1748" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8DAEF;strokeColor=#7D3C98;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>ON_ROUTE_TO_CUSTOMER</b><br><font color="#555">Courier en route — customer can track</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="1844" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8DAEF;strokeColor=#7D3C98;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>ARRIVED_AT_CUSTOMER</b><br><font color="#555">Courier marks arrival at delivery address</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="260" x="520" y="1940" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="33" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDEBD0;strokeColor=#E67E22;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>OTP Verification</b><br><font color="#555">Customer reads 6-digit OTP to courier<br>Attempts counted; OTP never logged</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="520" y="2036" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="34" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEF9E7;strokeColor=#F39C12;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="OTP
Valid?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="535" y="2142" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="35" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5F5E3;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>DELIVERED</b><br><font color="#555">Order closed — earnings recorded for courier<br>Customer invited to rate delivery</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="520" y="2262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="36" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C0392B;strokeColor=#922B21;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="END" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="580" y="2368" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="37" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FADBD8;strokeColor=#C0392B;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>Order Rejected</b><br><font color="#555">Refund initiated</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="190" x="870" y="843" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="38" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FADBD8;strokeColor=#C0392B;fontSize=10;align=center;" value="<b>No Courier Found</b><br><font color="#555">Wait &amp; retry dispatch</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="190" x="870" y="1357" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="39" parent="1"
